member.name: T:ItemLabelOverride.My.MyWebExtension
member.summary: Module used to define the properties that are available in the My Namespace for Web projects.

member.name: P:ItemLabelOverride.My.MyWebExtension.Computer
member.summary: Returns information about the host computer.

member.name: P:ItemLabelOverride.My.MyWebExtension.User
member.summary: Returns information for the current Web user.

member.name: T:ItemLabelOverride.My.Resources.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:ItemLabelOverride.My.Resources.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:ItemLabelOverride.My.Resources.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.summary: Represents a strongly typed in-memory cache of data.

member.summary: Represents the strongly named DataTable class.

member.summary: Represents the connection and commands used to retrieve and save data.

member.name: T:ItemLabelOverride.dsControlTableAdapters.TableAdapterManager
member.summary: TableAdapterManager is used to coordinate TableAdapters in the dataset to enable Hierarchical Update scenarios

member.name: M:ItemLabelOverride.dsControlTableAdapters.TableAdapterManager.GetRealUpdatedRows(System.Data.DataRow[],System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Data.DataRow})
member.summary: Remove inserted rows that become updated rows after calling TableAdapter.Update(inserted rows) first

member.summary: Update all changes to the dataset.
